Private Client Workspace

烁翌国际

Export Growth Platform

让外贸业务员每天知道该找谁、怎么跟、如何报价。

烁翌国际把客户开发、标准件知识、外贸报价和订单跟单放进一个私有工作台，帮助团队把零散信息变成可执行的业务动作。

客户开发雷达 私有跟进记录 报价计算器 订单跟单查询
Private Workspace Built for export sales teams, trading companies, and source factories.

需要先连接 Supabase

当前版本已经接好登录、邀请码和个人数据结构。上线前请填写 Supabase URL 与 anon key，并在 Supabase 执行数据库 SQL。

supabase-config.js

Login

登录客户工作台

Sign in to your private client workspace.

每个账号的收藏、跟进状态和备注彼此隔离。

Favorites, follow-up status, and notes are kept private for each account.

管理员使用邮箱密码登录后，还需要输入后台权限码才能进入管理员后台。Admins sign in with email and password, then unlock the admin console with a secure access code.

Invite Only

注册学员账号

Create a student account by invitation only.

请输入管理员发放的邀请码。注册成功后先填写单位和产品信息。

Enter the invite code from your administrator, then complete your company and product profile.

Password Recovery

重置登录密码

Reset your account password.

输入注册邮箱，系统会发送一封重置密码邮件。

Enter your registered email address and we will send a secure reset link.

New Password

设置新密码

Set a new password.

请输入新的登录密码，保存后需要重新登录。

Enter a new password. You will sign in again after it is saved.

Onboarding

填写你的开发方向

Complete your sales development profile.

系统会根据这些信息调整每日推荐客户。

Daily recommendations are tailored to your products and target markets.

Shipment Tracking

客户查货入口

Customer shipment portal

输入订单号和查询码，查看管理员公开给客户的生产、装柜、海运和到港进度。

Enter the order number and access code to view the production, loading, ocean freight, and arrival updates shared by the administrator.
